# Supplier Qualification Framework: Building a Robust Pre-Qualification Process for Critical Equipment

## 适用受众
Sourcing_Manager

## 写作角度说明
供应商准入评估是采购决策的第一道防线。本角度帮助采购专家建立系统化的供应商资质评估框架，确保只与符合标准的供应商合作。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
A rigorous pre-qualification framework—financial health, quality systems, technical capability, delivery performance—prevents procurement disasters that account teams and project managers pay for years.

## 参考素材
- Financial qualification: audited statements, credit ratings, insurance coverage (product liability, professional indemnity)
- Quality system assessment: ISO 9001:2015 certification scope, CAPA systems, complaint handling effectiveness
- Technical capability evaluation: manufacturing capacity, testing facilities, engineering expertise
- Delivery performance tracking: on-time delivery rates, lead time reliability, logistics capabilities
- Reference verification process: peer company contact, historical performance data, site audit results
- Risk assessment matrix: probability/impact scoring, mitigation strategies, monitoring approach

## 关键词
Supplier Qualification, Pre-Qualification, Risk Assessment, Quality Systems, Financial Health, Technical Capability, Delivery Performance
